creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-12-25 19:24:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/py-namebench     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  An experiment in benchmarking DNS name services. This tool
  is designed to help you as a user determine what name services
  are the best to use for an individual machine.
  
  WWW: http://namebench.googlecode.com/
  
  PR:             ports/141202
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil at tandon.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.111     +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/dns/py-namebench/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/py-namebench/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/py-namebench/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +52 -0     ports/dns/py-namebench/pkg-plist (new)
